# BP-128 variant negative: a QueryRowContext result distinguishes sql.ErrNoRows.
lang: go
file: BP-128-variant-safe.go
variant: database-sql-queryrow-context-safe
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"errors"
)

func findEmail(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, id int) (string, error) {
	row := db.QueryRowContext(ctx, "SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?", id)
	var email string
	err := row.Scan(&email)
	if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
		return "", nil
	}
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}
	return email, nil
}
